Formatting Guidance

            
Quick reference for formatting inputs in NetSuite MCP prompts

        

        

            

                

                    

                        
Date Format

                        
Always use DD/MM/YYYY for tool parameters.

                        

                            Example
                            01/01/2024 to 31/12/2024
                        

                    


                    

                        
Standard Time Periods

                        

                            
Current PeriodThis month / quarter / year

                            
Prior PeriodLast month / quarter / year

                            
YTDYear-to-date (fiscal year start to today)

                            
QTDQuarter-to-date

                            
MTDMonth-to-date

                        

                    


                    

                        
Common Date Ranges

                        

                            
PeriodDate Range

                            
Fiscal Year01/01/2024 to 31/12/2024

                            
Q1 202401/01/2024 to 31/03/2024

                            
Q2 202401/04/2024 to 30/06/2024

                            
Q3 202401/07/2024 to 30/09/2024

                            
Q4 202401/10/2024 to 31/12/2024

                        

                    

                


                

                    

                        
Standard NetSuite Entities

                        
    
                            
  • Customers / Prospects / Leads — Companies we sell to
    • 
                            
  • Transactions — Sales orders, invoices, payments, estimates
    • 
                            
  • Items — Products and services we sell
    • 
                            
  • Employees — Internal team members and sales reps
    • 
                            
  • Vendors — Third-party suppliers and partners
    • 
                            
  • Projects — Projects or jobs for delivering services
    • 
                            
  • Cases — Support cases or tickets for customer support
    • 
                        

                    


                    

                        
Key Transaction Types

                        
    
                            
  • Sales Order — Confirmed customer orders
    • 
                            
  • Estimate / Quote — Preliminary pricing proposals
    • 
                            
  • Invoice — Billing documents
    • 
                            
  • Cash Sale — Immediate payment transactions
    • 
                            
  • Credit Memo — Refunds and adjustments
    •
